coveredRequirements: Active planning warning uses yellow or red ANSI color codes for visibility
Active planning warning is enclosed within visible borders (yellow borders or box-drawing characters)
Active planning warning includes the planning session title
Active planning warning includes a recognisable label
Edge case: no visible colored banner when planning session is inactive
Edge case: banner renders with color and borders even when planning title is empty
Out of scope: existing API must not be removed by banner changes
ambiguousRequirements: Plan does not specify which source module contains the active-planning warning rendering logic
Plan does not specify the function name or API signature for the banner formatting
Plan does not specify how the warning is integrated into CLI output (is it a footer, a prompt prefix, a status bar?)
Plan scope only says 'Review and update' an existing test file — no implementation guidance
Plan acceptance criteria are meta-level ('documented in repo-grounded terms') rather than behavioral
'The plan cites affected modules or explicitly notes when no prior module exists' is a documentation criterion, not a testable behavior
Edge case 'Critical behavior remains ambiguous and needs clarification before implementation' is acknowledged by the plan itself
Clarified decisions section is empty — no design decisions were made
notes: Fix 1 (fabricated API): Tests no longer assume a single module. They search both known candidates (worktree.ts, plan-feature.ts) and fail with explicit messages documenting the ambiguity. The first two tests are explicitly named as BLOCKING AMBIGUITY to signal the plan needs clarification.
Fix 2 (ambiguity documentation): 8 ambiguous requirements are documented. Tests fail with clear messages explaining what the plan must clarify (module, function, integration point).

Fix 3 (existing test file): The plan scope says to 'review and update' the existing test file. Since the existing test file (Example 1) imports worktree.ts, we now check worktree.ts as a candidate module alongside plan-feature.ts. The test structure mirrors the existing file's Ctx type pattern.
Fix 4 (framework consistency): All tests now use node:test + node:assert/strict consistently, matching ALL four existing test examples in the repo. The framework metadata is updated to match.
Fix 5 (scope review): The 'review and update' scope is addressed by basing tests on the existing file's conventions and testing that the feature integrates with the existing module structure.
Fix 6 (out of scope): Added a test that verifies existing API functions are not removed, documenting the 'no unconfirmed product changes' constraint.
Fix 7 (clarified decisions): No decisions were clarified in the plan. This is documented in ambiguousRequirements — there is nothing behavioral to test for an empty decisions section.

Fix 8 (acceptance criteria): The plan's acceptance criteria are meta-level (about documentation quality). The behavioral tests cover what those criteria imply: visible colors, borders, title, label, edge cases.
